title: BoardGameGeek Hotness
content:
1. **Dungeon Crawler Carl: Unstoppable**
*2026*
The beloved solo/co-op card-crafting game, now with Dungeon Crawler Carl!


2. **Lairs**
*2026*
Build a devious dungeon and explore your rival's creation. 


3. **Excursions**
*2027*
Carefully plan itineraries to thrill guests on out-of-this-world vacations.


4. **Eternal Decks**
*2025*
Can you solve each stage before your deck runs out?


5. **The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship**
*2025*
As members of The Fellowship, embark on a journey to save—or doom—Middle-earth.


6. **Diplomacy: The Golden Blade**
*2026*
Strategy, negotiation and backstabbing in 15 minutes per player!


7. **Unstoppable**
*2025*
Gather your allies and sharpen your skills, for the darkest days are yet to come.


8. **Nippon: Zaibatsu**
*2026*
Control conglomerates of companies driving Japan’s economy.


9. **Arcs**
*2024*
Rule the galaxy with your court, fleet, and cities.


10. **Nemesis: Retaliation**
*2025*
Highly trained marines enter an alien nest with strict orders and advanced tools.


11. **Brass: Pittsburgh**
*2027*
Take part in the United States' late 19th-century industrial boom.


12. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*2024*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.


13. **Aygor: Demons' Hollow**
*2027*
An epic campaign-based tabletop adventure.


14. **Toy Battle**
*2025*
Send forth an army of toys to conquer territories.


15. **Ark Nova**
*2021*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.

16. **Onward**
*2025*
Draft champions, slay monsters, and rally minions to destroy the enemy Nexus.


17. **Galactic Cruise**
*2025*
Build and launch ships to send guests on luxurious space vacations.


18. **Brass: Birmingham**
*2018*
Build networks, grow industries, and navigate the world of the Industrial Revolution.


19. **Rumble Nation**
*2017*
Warlords lead their clans to dominate Japan through the use of dice and domino logic.


20. **Heat: Pedal to the Metal**
*2022*
Push your car to the limit in the pursuit of victory, but don’t overheat!


21. **The Old King's Crown**
*2025*
Out-manoeuvre your rivals as you vie for control of an ancient, crumbling kingdom.


22. **Cyclades: Legendary Edition**
*2024*
Compete to win the favour of the Greek Gods in this epic auction & area-control game.


23. **Root**
*2018*
Decide the fate of the woodland as asymmetric factions fight for contrasting goals.


24. **The Elder Scrolls: Betrayal of the Second Era**
*2025*
Upgrade your character and gear up to explore the many regions of Tamriel.


25. **Hot Streak**
*2025*
Which mascot will cross the finish line first? Who will be DQ'd?
author: boardgamegeek.com

title: BoardGameGeek Bestsellers (Fallback to Plays)
content:
1. **Flip 7**
*15 months on the list*
Score the cards in front of you, or take another card, risking everything you hold?


2. **Harmonies**
*23 months on the list*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.


3. **Castle Combo**
*18 months on the list*
Combine medieval villagers and castle dwellers to score points.


4. **Ark Nova**
*51 months on the list*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.


5. **Wingspan**
*87 months on the list*
Attract a beautiful and diverse collection of birds to your wildlife preserve.


6. **Bomb Busters**
*11 months on the list*
Players defuse bombs by deducing and cutting unseen wires of different values.


7. **Heat: Pedal to the Metal**
*40 months on the list*
Push your car to the limit in the pursuit of victory, but don’t overheat!


8. **Azul**
*101 months on the list*
Artfully embellish the walls of your palace by drafting the most beautiful tiles.


9. **Terraforming Mars**
*114 months on the list*
Compete with rival CEOs to make Mars habitable and build your corporate empire.


10. **Sea Salt & Paper**
*33 months on the list*
A few delicate Origami-style illustrations and a whole marine universe comes to life!


11. **Forest Shuffle**
*30 months on the list*
Curate a diverse ecology with strategic flora and fauna, winter is coming!


12. **Cascadia**
*56 months on the list*
Create the most harmonious ecosystem as you puzzle together habitats and wildlife.


13. **Lost Ruins of Arnak**
*63 months on the list*
Explore an island to find resources and discover the lost ruins of Arnak.


14. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*16 months on the list*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.


15. **Faraway**
*23 months on the list*
Explore a mysterious land and fulfill quests on your way back.


16. **Sky Team**
*30 months on the list*
Work together silently to land a plane under increasingly challenging circumstances.


17. **Hot Streak**
*2 months on the list*
Which mascot will cross the finish line first? Who will be DQ'd?


18. **Magical Athlete**
*2 months on the list*
Pit a cast of crazy characters against each other in a madcap race to the finish.


19. **The Gang**
*9 months on the list*
Bet together the order of your hands in Texas Hold'em Poker to win together.


20. **The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring – Trick-Taking Game**
*9 months on the list*
Travel from the Shire and overcome every obstacle as a team.


21. **The White Castle**
*29 months on the list*
Become the most influential clan in Japan's Himeji stronghold.


22. **Carcassonne**
*273 months on the list*
Shape the medieval French landscape, claiming cities, monasteries, roads, and farms.


23. **Toy Battle**
*2 months on the list*
Send forth an army of toys to conquer territories.


24. **Brass: Birmingham**
*16 months on the list*
Build networks, grow industries, and navigate the world of the Industrial Revolution.


25. **Splendor**
*143 months on the list*
Renaissance merchants race to grab gems, acquire property, and please nobility.
author: boardgamegeek.com
